problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation may resolve How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
